requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Bangladesh vs China GB/T 26572
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——孟加拉国无横向 RoHS 制度与中国 GB/T 26572 对比
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——孟加拉無橫向 RoHS 制度與中國 GB/T 26572 對比

summary.en: Bangladesh does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting specific hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a general market-access condition. There is no Bangladesh equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS) or to China's GB/T 26572 substance-concentration-limit standard that applies horizontally to LED luminaires. Where substance control is relevant, it is generally addressed through product-specific BSTI standards (which adopt the relevant BDS/IEC safety standard for the lamp/luminaire) and through general environmental and hazardous-materials law administered by the Department of Environment under the Bangladesh Environment Conservation Act — none of which imposes a RoHS-style 0.1%/0.01% homogeneous-material restriction or a RoHS Declaration of Conformity for EEE. Exporters should state RoHS honestly: it is an EU concept, not a Bangladesh market-access requirement.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国并不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，即不将电气电子设备中特定有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE、邻苯二甲酸酯）的限制作为一般市场准入条件。孟加拉国没有相当于欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS）或中国 GB/T 26572 物质浓度限值标准、且横向适用于 LED 灯具的制度。在涉及物质管控时，通常通过产品特定的 BSTI 标准（采用相关 BDS/IEC 灯/灯具安全标准）及由环境部依据《孟加拉国环境保护法》管理的一般环境与危险物质法处理——上述均不施加 RoHS 式 0.1%/0.01% 均质材料限制，也不要求 EEE 出具 RoHS 符合性声明。出口商应如实说明 RoHS：这是欧盟概念，并非孟加拉国市场准入要求。
summary.zht: 孟加拉並不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，即不將電氣電子設備中特定有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE、鄰苯二甲酸酯）的限制作為一般市場准入條件。孟加拉沒有相當於歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS）或中國 GB/T 26572 物質濃度限值標準、且橫向適用於 LED 燈具的制度。在涉及物質管控時，通常通過產品特定的 BSTI 標準（採用相關 BDS/IEC 燈/燈具安全標準）及由環境部依據《孟加拉環境保護法》管理的一般環境與危險物質法處理——上述均不施加 RoHS 式 0.1%/0.01% 均質材料限制，也不要求 EEE 出具 RoHS 符合性聲明。出口商應如實說明 RoHS：這是歐盟概念，並非孟加拉市場准入要求。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS regime in Bangladesh — no national equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU restricting hazardous substances in EEE as a general market-access condition
Bangladesh Environment Conservation Act / Department of Environment — general environmental and hazardous-materials oversight (not a RoHS substance restriction)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, with the SJ/T 11364-2014 marking standard) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains substances above threshold / green = below threshold) on EEE sold in China. China's regime is disclosure-and-marking oriented rather than an outright market-access restriction.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（管理办法及 SJ/T 11364-2014 标识标准）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色=含量超过限值/绿色=低于限值）。中国制度以披露与标识为导向，而非直接的市场准入限制。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法及 SJ/T 11364-2014 標識標準）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色=含量超過限值/綠色=低於限值）。中國制度以披露與標識為導向，而非直接的市場准入限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is a case where the target market has LESS substance regulation than the EU and is broadly comparable to or lighter than China. Bangladesh imposes no horizontal RoHS restriction and no RoHS DoC requirement for LED luminaires, so a Chinese exporter does not face an EU-style 10-substance restriction (including the 4 phthalates) for Bangladesh market access. Practical notes: (1) the absence of a RoHS regime does NOT remove the BSTI safety certification or any applicable lamp-specific limits (e.g., mercury content limits inherent in certain lamp-type IEC standards still apply through the adopted BDS); (2) the in-country importer or buyer may still contractually require RoHS-type declarations, and any onward re-export to RoHS jurisdictions would re-introduce the obligation; (3) Bangladesh's general environmental law governs hazardous-materials handling but is not a product-substance market-access restriction. State this honestly to avoid implying a Bangladesh RoHS that does not exist.
gap.zh: 这是目标市场物质监管少于欧盟、且与中国大致可比或更轻的情形。孟加拉国对 LED 灯具不施加横向 RoHS 限制，也不要求 RoHS 符合性声明，因此中国出口商进入孟加拉国市场时不面临欧盟式 10 项物质限制（含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）。实务说明：（1）无 RoHS 制度并不免除 BSTI 安全认证或任何适用的灯特定限值（如某些灯型 IEC 标准固有的汞含量限值仍通过所采用的 BDS 适用）；（2）在地进口商或买方仍可能在合同中要求 RoHS 类声明，且任何向 RoHS 司法辖区的转出口都会重新引入该义务；（3）孟加拉国一般环境法管理危险物质处置，但并非产品物质市场准入限制。应如实说明，以免暗示存在并不存在的孟加拉国 RoHS。
gap.zht: 這是目標市場物質監管少於歐盟、且與中國大致可比或更輕的情形。孟加拉對 LED 燈具不施加橫向 RoHS 限制，也不要求 RoHS 符合性聲明，因此中國出口商進入孟加拉市場時不面臨歐盟式 10 項物質限制（含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）。實務說明：（1）無 RoHS 制度並不免除 BSTI 安全認證或任何適用的燈特定限值（如某些燈型 IEC 標準固有的汞含量限值仍通過所採用的 BDS 適用）；（2）在地進口商或買方仍可能在合同中要求 RoHS 類聲明，且任何向 RoHS 司法轄區的轉出口都會重新引入該義務；（3）孟加拉一般環境法管理危險物質處置，但並非產品物質市場准入限制。應如實說明，以免暗示存在並不存在的孟加拉 RoHS。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Bangladesh has no horizontal RoHS substance restriction or RoHS DoC requirement for LED luminaires as a market-access condition
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh has NO EU-style horizontal RoHS regime and no RoHS Declaration of Conformity requirement for LED luminaires as a market-access condition — this is an honest difference from the EU. China operates a disclosure-and-marking RoHS 2 (GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364). For Bangladesh, the exporter's substance obligations come from product-specific BSTI/BDS-IEC safety standards and general environmental law, not a RoHS substance restriction. Buyers may still contractually request RoHS declarations, and onward re-export to RoHS jurisdictions would re-introduce the obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，也不将 RoHS 符合性声明作为 LED 灯具的市场准入条件——这是与欧盟的真实差异。中国实行以披露与标识为导向的 RoHS 2（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）。对于孟加拉国，出口商的物质义务来自产品特定的 BSTI/BDS-IEC 安全标准及一般环境法，而非 RoHS 物质限制。买方仍可能在合同中要求 RoHS 声明，且向 RoHS 司法辖区的转出口会重新引入该义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，也不將 RoHS 符合性聲明作為 LED 燈具的市場准入條件——這是與歐盟的真實差異。中國實行以披露與標識為導向的 RoHS 2（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）。對於孟加拉，出口商的物質義務來自產品特定的 BSTI/BDS-IEC 安全標準及一般環境法，而非 RoHS 物質限制。買方仍可能在合同中要求 RoHS 聲明，且向 RoHS 司法轄區的轉出口會重新引入該義務。

requirement_topic.en: Chemicals / SVHC Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-style Obligation in Bangladesh
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / SVHC 供应链通报——孟加拉国无 REACH 式义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / SVHC 供應鏈通報——孟加拉無 REACH 式義務

summary.en: Bangladesh has NO equivalent to the EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 supply-chain SVHC (Substance of Very High Concern) notification obligation, and no ECHA-style Candidate List or SCIP-style article database. There is no Bangladesh legal duty for an LED luminaire supplier to proactively notify business customers or consumers when an article contains an SVHC above 0.1% w/w. Chemical management in Bangladesh is addressed through general instruments such as the Bangladesh Environment Conservation Act and Rules and hazardous-waste/chemical handling provisions administered by the Department of Environment, plus import controls — but these do not create an article-level SVHC communication duty for finished EEE. For Bangladesh market access, the exporter's obligations are the BSTI product certification, SREDA labelling where applicable, and BTRC for wireless variants — not a REACH-style chemical notification.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国没有相当于欧盟 REACH 法规（EC）1907/2006 第 33 条供应链 SVHC（高度关注物质）通报义务的制度，也没有 ECHA 式候选清单或 SCIP 式物品数据库。孟加拉国没有要求 LED 灯具供应商在物品含 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报商业客户或消费者的法律义务。孟加拉国的化学品管理通过《孟加拉国环境保护法及规则》及由环境部管理的危险废物/化学品处置条款，加之进口管制等一般工具处理——但这些并不为成品 EEE 产生物品级 SVHC 通报义务。就孟加拉国市场准入而言，出口商的义务为 BSTI 产品认证、如适用的 SREDA 标签及无线型号的 BTRC——而非 REACH 式化学品通报。
summary.zht: 孟加拉沒有相當於歐盟 REACH 法規（EC）1907/2006 第 33 條供應鏈 SVHC（高度關注物質）通報義務的制度，也沒有 ECHA 式候選清單或 SCIP 式物品數據庫。孟加拉沒有要求 LED 燈具供應商在物品含 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報商業客戶或消費者的法律義務。孟加拉的化學品管理通過《孟加拉環境保護法及規則》及由環境部管理的危險廢物/化學品處置條款，加之進口管制等一般工具處理——但這些並不為成品 EEE 產生物品級 SVHC 通報義務。就孟加拉市場准入而言，出口商的義務為 BSTI 產品認證、如適用的 SREDA 標籤及無線型號的 BTRC——而非 REACH 式化學品通報。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-style obligation in Bangladesh — no national equivalent to REACH (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification or to the ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database
Bangladesh Environment Conservation Act and Rules — general environmental/chemical oversight (Department of Environment); not an article-level SVHC communication duty

summary.en: China likewise has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification. The closest CN instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) on new chemical substance registration and GB 30981-2020 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals labelling. None creates a duty to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in a finished article above 0.1% w/w. So both China and Bangladesh lack the EU's REACH article-notification duty.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）关于新化学物质登记，及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签）用于危险化学品标签。上述均未产生在成品物品含 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。因此中国与孟加拉国均不具备欧盟 REACH 物品通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）關於新化學物質登記，及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤）用於危險化學品標籤。上述均未產生在成品物品含 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。因此中國與孟加拉均不具備歐盟 REACH 物品通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Neither Bangladesh nor China imposes the EU's REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, so this is an area where the China-to-Bangladesh route does NOT add a REACH-style burden — a Chinese exporter already accustomed to the absence of an article-notification duty faces no new Bangladesh obligation of this kind. The honest point to convey: do not represent a REACH/SVHC obligation as existing in Bangladesh. Practical caveats: (1) the in-country importer or a brand buyer may still contractually require SVHC/REACH declarations, especially if the goods are onward-exported to the EU; (2) general Bangladesh environmental and hazardous-materials law still applies to handling, storage, and waste, just not as an article-level product-substance communication duty; (3) any SVHC obligation re-attaches if the product is later placed on the EU or other REACH-aligned market.
gap.zh: 孟加拉国与中国均不施加欧盟 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务，因此在这一领域，中国出口至孟加拉国的路径不会新增 REACH 式负担——已习惯于不存在物品通报义务的中国出口商在孟加拉国不面临此类新义务。须如实传达：不得表述孟加拉国存在 REACH/SVHC 义务。实务注意：（1）在地进口商或品牌买方仍可能在合同中要求 SVHC/REACH 声明，尤其当货物转出口至欧盟时；（2）孟加拉国一般环境及危险物质法仍适用于处置、储存及废弃，只是并非物品级产品物质通报义务；（3）若产品日后投放欧盟或其他 REACH 对齐市场，SVHC 义务将重新附加。
gap.zht: 孟加拉與中國均不施加歐盟 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，因此在這一領域，中國出口至孟加拉的路徑不會新增 REACH 式負擔——已習慣於不存在物品通報義務的中國出口商在孟加拉不面臨此類新義務。須如實傳達：不得表述孟加拉存在 REACH/SVHC 義務。實務注意：（1）在地進口商或品牌買方仍可能在合同中要求 SVHC/REACH 聲明，尤其當貨物轉出口至歐盟時；（2）孟加拉一般環境及危險物質法仍適用於處置、儲存及廢棄，只是並非物品級產品物質通報義務；（3）若產品日後投放歐盟或其他 REACH 對齊市場，SVHC 義務將重新附加。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no REACH-style Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification or SCIP-style obligation exists in Bangladesh
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no article-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI) / Department of Environment, Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Neither Bangladesh nor China imposes an EU REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, and Bangladesh has no ECHA-style Candidate List or SCIP database. Do not represent a REACH/SVHC obligation as a Bangladesh market-access requirement. The exporter's Bangladesh obligations are BSTI certification, SREDA labelling where applicable, and BTRC for wireless variants. SVHC/REACH duties only re-attach if the product is later placed on the EU or another REACH-aligned market, or if a buyer contractually requires it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国与中国均不施加欧盟 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务，孟加拉国也没有 ECHA 式候选清单或 SCIP 数据库。不得将 REACH/SVHC 义务表述为孟加拉国市场准入要求。出口商的孟加拉国义务为 BSTI 认证、如适用的 SREDA 标签及无线型号的 BTRC。仅当产品日后投放欧盟或其他 REACH 对齐市场，或买方在合同中要求时，SVHC/REACH 义务才会重新附加。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉與中國均不施加歐盟 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，孟加拉也沒有 ECHA 式候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫。不得將 REACH/SVHC 義務表述為孟加拉市場准入要求。出口商的孟加拉義務為 BSTI 認證、如適用的 SREDA 標籤及無線型號的 BTRC。僅當產品日後投放歐盟或其他 REACH 對齊市場，或買方在合同中要求時，SVHC/REACH 義務才會重新附加。

requirement_topic.en: BSTI Mandatory Certification Mark, Marking and Import Process vs China CCC / GB Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: BSTI 强制认证标志、标识及进口流程与中国 CCC / GB 基线对比
requirement_topic.zht: BSTI 強制認證標誌、標識及進口流程與中國 CCC / GB 基線對比

summary.en: Lamps and luminaires are within BSTI's mandatory certification regime in Bangladesh. To place LED lamps/luminaires on the Bangladesh market, the product must obtain BSTI certification (commonly via a Certification Marks (CM) Licence for local placement, and/or an import-permission/clearance certificate for imported goods) demonstrating conformity to the relevant Bangladesh Standard (BDS adopting IEC 60598 for luminaires and IEC 60598/62560 for lamps). The process generally requires: (1) an in-country importer/representative; (2) submission of product details and test evidence against the adopted BDS/IEC standard; (3) BSTI assessment and grant of the certification mark; (4) the BSTI mark and required marking on the product/packaging; and (5) customs clearance at the port of entry (Chattogram or Mongla) with the BSTI documentation. BSTI may accept test reports from recognised laboratories or require testing within Bangladesh — confirm the current procedure and acceptable laboratories.
summary.zh: 灯及灯具属于孟加拉国 BSTI 强制认证范畴。要将 LED 灯/灯具投放孟加拉国市场，产品须取得 BSTI 认证（本地投放通常通过认证标志（CM）许可，进口货物则通过进口许可/通关证书），证明符合相关孟加拉国标准（BDS 对灯具采用 IEC 60598、对灯采用 IEC 60598/62560）。流程通常要求：（1）在地进口商/代表；（2）提交产品资料及依据所采用 BDS/IEC 标准的检测证据；（3）BSTI 评定并授予认证标志；（4）在产品/包装上标注 BSTI 标志及必要标识；（5）在入境口岸（吉大港或蒙拉港）凭 BSTI 文件清关。BSTI 可能接受认可实验室的检测报告或要求在孟加拉国境内检测——请确认现行程序及可接受实验室。
summary.zht: 燈及燈具屬於孟加拉 BSTI 強制認證範疇。要將 LED 燈/燈具投放孟加拉市場，產品須取得 BSTI 認證（本地投放通常通過認證標誌（CM）許可，進口貨物則通過進口許可/通關證書），證明符合相關孟加拉標準（BDS 對燈具採用 IEC 60598、對燈採用 IEC 60598/62560）。流程通常要求：（1）在地進口商/代表；（2）提交產品資料及依據所採用 BDS/IEC 標準的檢測證據；（3）BSTI 評定並授予認證標誌；（4）在產品/包裝上標註 BSTI 標誌及必要標識；（5）在入境口岸（吉大港或蒙拉港）憑 BSTI 文件清關。BSTI 可能接受認可實驗室的檢測報告或要求在孟加拉境內檢測——請確認現行程序及可接受實驗室。

standards_or_laws: BSTI mandatory certification (Certification Marks Licence / import clearance) for lamps and luminaires — Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution
BDS adopting IEC 60598 (luminaire safety) and IEC 60598/62560 (lamps) — applicable Bangladesh Standards for the product category

summary.en: In China, the safety/market baseline for luminaires is governed by GB 7000 series safety standards (e.g., GB/T 7000.1 general luminaire requirements) and energy efficiency by GB 30255, with CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA via bodies such as CQC) as the mandatory third-party certification for in-scope residential luminaires. The CCC mark plus GB-standard compliance is the Chinese market-entry baseline. CCC and the GB standards are China-specific and are not recognised by BSTI for Bangladesh certification purposes.
summary.zh: 在中国，灯具的安全/市场基线由 GB 7000 系列安全标准（如 GB/T 7000.1 通用灯具要求）规范，能效由 GB 30255 规范，CCC（中国强制性产品认证，由 CNCA 通过 CQC 等机构管理）为范围内居民灯具的强制第三方认证。CCC 标志加 GB 标准合规为中国市场准入基线。CCC 及 GB 标准为中国特有，不被 BSTI 认可用于孟加拉国认证目的。
summary.zht: 在中國，燈具的安全/市場基線由 GB 7000 系列安全標準（如 GB/T 7000.1 通用燈具要求）規範，能效由 GB 30255 規範，CCC（中國強制性產品認證，由 CNCA 通過 CQC 等機構管理）為範圍內居民燈具的強制第三方認證。CCC 標誌加 GB 標準合規為中國市場准入基線。CCC 及 GB 標準為中國特有，不被 BSTI 認可用於孟加拉認證目的。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000 series — luminaire safety (e.g., GB/T 7000.1 general requirements) (SAC/SAMR)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA/CQC; GB 30255-2019 energy efficiency baseline

gap.en: BSTI certification and China's CCC/GB baseline are parallel, non-mutual regimes — a Chinese CCC certificate and GB 7000/GB 30255 evidence do not satisfy BSTI. Key Bangladesh-specific steps with no Chinese counterpart: (1) an in-country importer/representative is generally needed for BSTI certification and import clearance; (2) BSTI assessment must be obtained against the adopted BDS/IEC standard (IEC 60598 / 62560), and the BSTI certification mark and Bangladesh-required marking applied; (3) customs clearance at Chattogram or Mongla requires the BSTI documentation; (4) BSTI may require testing within Bangladesh or only accept reports from recognised laboratories, so Chinese CNAS/CCC test reports may need mapping, supplementation, or re-testing. The technical content (IEC 60598-based) overlaps substantially with China's GB 7000 (also IEC 60598-derived), reducing re-testing scope, but the certification, marking, and import process are entirely separate and must be completed for Bangladesh.
gap.zh: BSTI 认证与中国 CCC/GB 基线为并行、非互认制度——中国 CCC 证书及 GB 7000/GB 30255 证据不满足 BSTI。主要孟加拉国特有步骤（无中国对应）：（1）BSTI 认证及进口清关通常需要在地进口商/代表；（2）须依据所采用 BDS/IEC 标准（IEC 60598 / 62560）取得 BSTI 评定，并标注 BSTI 认证标志及孟加拉国要求的标识；（3）在吉大港或蒙拉港清关须凭 BSTI 文件；（4）BSTI 可能要求在孟加拉国境内检测或仅接受认可实验室的报告，因此中国 CNAS/CCC 检测报告可能需要映射、补充或重新检测。技术内容（基于 IEC 60598）与中国 GB 7000（同样源自 IEC 60598）大量重叠，可减少重新检测范围，但认证、标识及进口流程完全独立，须为孟加拉国单独完成。
gap.zht: BSTI 認證與中國 CCC/GB 基線為並行、非互認制度——中國 CCC 證書及 GB 7000/GB 30255 證據不滿足 BSTI。主要孟加拉特有步驟（無中國對應）：（1）BSTI 認證及進口清關通常需要在地進口商/代表；（2）須依據所採用 BDS/IEC 標準（IEC 60598 / 62560）取得 BSTI 評定，並標註 BSTI 認證標誌及孟加拉要求的標識；（3）在吉大港或蒙拉港清關須憑 BSTI 文件；（4）BSTI 可能要求在孟加拉境內檢測或僅接受認可實驗室的報告，因此中國 CNAS/CCC 檢測報告可能需要映射、補充或重新檢測。技術內容（基於 IEC 60598）與中國 GB 7000（同樣源自 IEC 60598）大量重疊，可減少重新檢測範圍，但認證、標識及進口流程完全獨立，須為孟加拉單獨完成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BSTI certification (Certification Marks Licence / import clearance) and BSTI mark required for lamps and luminaires before lawful import and sale; in-country importer generally required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope residential luminaires; GB 7000 safety and GB 30255 energy efficiency are the Chinese baselines

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BSTI mandatory certification (with the BSTI mark) is the core Bangladesh market-access requirement for LED lamps and luminaires, assessed against the adopted BDS/IEC 60598/62560 standards, and is parallel to — not mutually recognised with — China's CCC/GB 7000/GB 30255 baseline. An in-country importer is generally needed; customs clearance at Chattogram or Mongla requires BSTI documentation; and BSTI may require local testing or accept only recognised-laboratory reports. The shared IEC 60598 basis reduces re-testing scope, but the certification, marking, and import process must be completed separately for Bangladesh.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BSTI 强制认证（附 BSTI 标志）是 LED 灯及灯具的核心孟加拉国市场准入要求，依据所采用的 BDS/IEC 60598/62560 标准评定，与中国 CCC/GB 7000/GB 30255 基线并行且不互认。通常需要在地进口商；在吉大港或蒙拉港清关须凭 BSTI 文件；BSTI 可能要求本地检测或仅接受认可实验室报告。共享的 IEC 60598 基础可减少重新检测范围，但认证、标识及进口流程须为孟加拉国单独完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BSTI 強制認證（附 BSTI 標誌）是 LED 燈及燈具的核心孟加拉市場准入要求，依據所採用的 BDS/IEC 60598/62560 標準評定，與中國 CCC/GB 7000/GB 30255 基線並行且不互認。通常需要在地進口商；在吉大港或蒙拉港清關須憑 BSTI 文件；BSTI 可能要求本地檢測或僅接受認可實驗室報告。共享的 IEC 60598 基礎可減少重新檢測範圍，但認證、標識及進口流程須為孟加拉單獨完成。
